name: Jati Tara (26th Nakshatra) — Ancestral Property Day
description: When transit Moon or Mars reaches the 26th nakshatra from birth Moon (Jati Tara = caste/lineage star), ancestral property matters reach culmination. This is the day for family property events.

source_text.quote: The 26th nakshatra from Janma Nakshatra is Jati Tara (lineage/caste star). Actions related to family lineage, ancestral property, and hereditary matters find success on this day.

all_of: Transit Moon or Mars is in the 26th nakshatra from birth Moon nakshatra (Jati Tara)
any_of: Dasha layer has already opened a property window
Transit layer has narrowed the window
Multiple property indicators are active simultaneously

interpretation.meaning: Jati Tara (26th nakshatra) is the lineage star. When fast planets (Moon/Mars) transit this point, ancestral property matters culminate — registration, transfer, inheritance receipt, or dispute resolution happen on this exact day.

metadata.notes: Jati = lineage/caste. The 26th nak triggers ancestral events. Best day for property registration or inheritance claims.

name: Moon Right Hand (25-27th Nakshatra) — Property Transfer Moment
description: Transit Moon in the 25th-27th nakshatra zone from birth Moon (right hand region in Tara chakra) creates the exact moment for property transfer, signing, and material exchange.

source_text.quote: The 25th to 27th nakshatras from Janma form the Dakshina Hasta (right hand). These govern material exchange, transfer of property, and completion of asset transactions.

all_of: Transit Moon is in 25th, 26th, or 27th nakshatra from birth Moon
any_of: Property dasha window is already open
Moon is in waxing phase (Shukla Paksha)

interpretation.meaning: The right hand zone (25-27th nak) governs material exchange and giving/receiving. Transit Moon here creates the exact moment for property deed signing, transfer completion, or inheritance receipt.

metadata.notes: Dakshina Hasta = right hand = giving/receiving. Exact timing for property handover.

name: Moon Two Eyes (9-10th Nakshatra) — Asset Visibility Day
description: Transit Moon in the 9th-10th nakshatra from birth Moon (Netra/eyes zone) brings visibility to hidden assets, reveals property opportunities, and makes inheritance matters clear.

source_text.quote: The 9th and 10th nakshatras from Janma are Netra Tara (eye stars). They bring clear vision regarding material matters, reveal hidden assets, and illuminate property opportunities.

all_of: Transit Moon is in 9th or 10th nakshatra from birth Moon
any_of: Hidden wealth indicators present in dasha

interpretation.meaning: Netra Tara (eye stars, 9-10th nak) brings clarity and visibility. Hidden property, unknown inheritance, or overlooked assets become visible. Good day for property investigation and valuation.

metadata.notes: Netra = eyes. Reveals hidden assets. Good for property valuation and discovery of inheritance.

name: Mars Head (16-17th Nakshatra) — Land Action Day
description: Transit Mars in the 16th-17th nakshatra from birth Moon (Shiras/head zone) creates the day for decisive land action — purchase, registration, boundary marking, or construction start.

source_text.quote: The 16th and 17th nakshatras from Janma are Shiras Tara (head stars). Mars transiting here governs decisive action regarding land, boundaries, and physical property.

all_of: Transit Mars is in 16th or 17th nakshatra from birth Moon
any_of: Mars dasha or antardasha is active
Land purchase or construction is planned

interpretation.meaning: Mars in the head zone (16-17th nak) creates the day for decisive land action. Physical property matters — buying land, starting construction, marking boundaries, or taking possession — find success here.

metadata.notes: Mars = land karaka. Head zone = decisive action. The day for physical property transactions.
